title: Philip's Mob Events
description: This mod adds Mob events/ perks to mobs. Improves of difficulty
body:
Have you ever wished that Minecraft could be a
little more of a challenge? Or have some improvements
for the mobs for Minecraft? Well, you found a perfect
mod just for that reason. Philip's Mob Events is a mod
that focus on improving the mob's difficulty. The mod basically
adds events to the game. Well, you may be wondering what types
of events? Well in this case we are talking about miniboss events,
as well as mob perks. These events are basically random of when it
can occur. So, make sure you are prepared to fight, or have a strong
base of self-defense. When an event dose occurs you my get a text
message in chat saying this for example:(A level Three Zombie Event
has summoned in). What this basically tells you is that there is
event levels. Every Event has its own level, so what this means
is that each level is random and will include that more mobs.
can be summoned/difficulty well be increased. So, watch out for these
events!

Now we also mention that the mod comes with perks. These perks are
basically, adding buffs to the mobs. So far, we only added perks for the
zombies, but the events can include these mobs: [Zombies,Skeletons,Creepers,
Spiders]. We are planning to add more perks to all of the mobs in the game,
and as well as new events. The perk that zombies have is a random chance of
duplicating when attacking.

All in conclusion we hope you enjoy the mod and have fun fighting the mobs.
The mod is still in beta, and we have more plans in the feature.

If you want to help contribute to the development process join are patreon.
https://www.patreon.com/PhilipModDev/membership
